blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.
Monday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
